quoted_tweet.text:
The world’s youngest self-made woman billionaire took on the U.S. government…and won.

Luana Lopes Lara, co-founder of @Kalshi, opens up about taking on the feds, her billionaire moment, and her Bitcoin story.

I really enjoyed this interview and I hope you will too!

00:00 Ballerina to in Brazil
